items.title_zh: 滴滴自动驾驶张博：聚焦安全和体验 推动自动驾驶全球化落地
items.summary_zh: 量子位：滴滴自动驾驶CEO张博表示，安全与体验是自动驾驶行稳致远的根基。滴滴联合广汽埃安推出新一代Robotaxi车型R2，配备多重安全冗余系统，满足中欧五星安全标准。公司已在广州和北京部分示范区域开展全天气、无载人乘客测试，采用混合出行网络探索可持续发展路径，依托全栈技术能力和本地化服务积累，推动中国自动驾驶产业走向全球。

items.title_zh: 奥特曼遭遇死亡威胁：凌晨家中被投燃烧瓶
items.summary_zh: 量子位：OpenAI CEO Sam Altman家中凌晨被投掷燃烧瓶，幸好无人受伤。Altman分享了家庭照片以震慑未来攻击，并反思AI伦理、与Elon Musk的冲突，呼吁共享AI技术避免AGI垄断化。

items.title_zh: 中国具身模型狂揽全球第一！机器人的人类数据时代来了
items.summary_zh: 量子位：00后创业公司灵初智能发布首个可用于预训练的大规模人类手部操作全模态数据集，含近10万小时数据（5417小时真机数据），其中1000小时已开源。推出双系统架构Psi-R2和Psi-W0，Psi-R2是世界行动模型登顶MolmoSpace榜单，Psi-W0是动作条件型世界模型，通过强化学习构建闭环数据飞轮。

items.title_zh: ChatGPT 推出100美元月费Pro计划
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：OpenAI宣布推出100美元月费的ChatGPT Pro订阅档位，满足长期以来的强力用户需求。此前服务的付费计划直接从20美元跳到200美元，新增的100美元档位填补了中间价格空缺。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: OpenAI announced a new $100/month ChatGPT Pro subscription tier, fulfilling a longstanding request from power users. Previously, the service's paid plans jumped directly from $20 to $200 per month.

items.title_en: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw's creator from accessing Claude Claude
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Anthropic暂时禁止OpenClaw创建者访问Claude，该禁令是在上周Claude对OpenClaw用户定价调整后实施的。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw's creator from accessing Claude. This ban took place after Claude's pricing changed for OpenClaw users last week.

items.title_en: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser's delusions and ignored her warnings
items.title_zh: 跟踪受害者起诉OpenAI，指控ChatGPT助长施暴者妄想并无视警告
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：一名跟踪受害者起诉OpenAI，指控公司无视三次警告称ChatGPT用户具有威胁性——包括自家大规模伤亡标志——而该用户跟踪骚扰其前女友。诉讼称AI工具放大了施暴者的妄想。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: A stalking victim has filed suit against OpenAI, alleging the company ignored three warnings that a ChatGPT user was a threat—including its own mass-casualty flag—while he stalked and harassed his ex-girlfriend. The suit claims the AI tool amplified the abuser's delusions.

items.title_en: Meta AI app climbs to No. 5 on the App Store after Muse Spark launch
items.title_zh: Meta AI应用在Muse Spark发布后升至App Store第5名
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Meta AI应用在推出Muse Spark新模型后排名从App Store第57位升至第5位并继续攀升。此前排名为57位，新模型发布后显著提升了应用表现。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: The Meta AI app climbed to No. 5 on the App Store after Muse Spark launch. It was ranking No. 57 before Meta AI's new model launch, and is now No. 5—and rising.

items.title_en: Cursor Bugbot now self-improves with learned rules
items.title_zh: Cursor Bugbot现在通过学习规则自我改进
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Cursor的Bugbot产品通过实时PR信号（包括踩踩评论、开发者解释建议缺陷、人工审查员标记遗漏问题）自我改进。目前解决率接近80%，比次优竞品高15个百分点，已分析超过5万个PR。
items.summary_en: Cursor: Bugbot now self-improves with learned rules by using real-time PR signals including downvotes, developer replies explaining flawed suggestions, and human reviewer comments flagging missed issues. Its resolution rate is nearly 80%, 15 percentage points higher than the next-closest competitor, having analyzed over 50,000 PRs.

items.title_en: Ali's Wan2.7 video generation model tops DesignArena leaderboard
items.title_zh: 阿里Wan2.7视频生成模型登顶DesignArena榜单
items.summary_zh: 量子位：阿里最新Wan2.7视频生成模型以1334 Elo评分登顶DesignArena视频生成榜单，领先第二名Grok Imagine 68分。Wan2.7-Video系列包含文生视频、图生视频、参考生视频和视频编辑模型，其视频编辑功能允许用户仅通过文本提示修改视频部分或全部。
items.summary_en: Quantum: Ali's latest Wan2.7 video generation model took first place on DesignArena's Video to Video leaderboard with a score of 1334 Elo, 68 points ahead of second-place Grok Imagine. The Wan2.7-Video series includes text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video, and video editing models.

items.title_en: Anthropic expands partnership with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of next-generation compute
items.title_zh: Anthropic与谷歌和博通深化合作获取数吉瓦下一代算力
items.summary_zh: Anthropic：Anthropic与谷歌和博通签署新协议获取多个吉瓦级下一代TPU算力，2027年起上线以满足激增的全球客户需求。2026年客户需求加速：年化营收超过300亿美元，高于2025年底的90亿美元。年消费超100万美元的企业客户数量在两个月内翻倍，现已超过1000家。
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Anthropic signed a new agreement with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of next-generation TPU capacity coming online starting in 2027. Customer demand accelerated in 2026: run-rate revenue surpassed $30 billion, up from ~$9 billion at end of 2025. The number of business customers spending over $1 million annually doubled in two months, now exceeding 1,000.
